title: centaurea × spuria
intro: Centaurea × spuria, also known as Spur Knaptop or Centaurea, is a hybrid plant that belongs to the Asteraceae family and is a cross between Centaurea cyanus and Centaurea calcitrapa. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic effects. Consuming Centaurea × spuria has been associated with various health benefits, such as reducing fever and alleviating symptoms of digestive issues, as well as exhibiting antioxidant and antimicrobial properties. The plant can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, and tinctures for medicinal use, although more research is needed to fully understand its effects and potential interactions with other medications.
